task_completion.description: Open the Jolly Lobby Track application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Search for 'Marcus Webb' or initiate the creation of a new visitor record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'Marcus Webb', or the 'Add Visitor' form is open with 'Marcus' in the First Name field and 'Webb' in the Last Name field.

task_completion.description: Access the visitor profile for Marcus Webb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific profile page or edit screen for 'Marcus Webb' is visible and active in the Jolly Lobby Track interface.
A file picker dialog is open over the Jolly Lobby Track application, indicating the agent clicked a button to add or upload a photo.

task_completion.description: Select the specified photo file from the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'visitor_photo_marcus_webb.jpg' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory is highlighted, or its path is entered in the file selection dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the photo is attached to Marcus Webb's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visitor profile for Marcus Webb displays the attached photo (which will look like a random noise image) in the designated photo section of the application.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI to attach the photo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the application's buttons and file dialogs, rather than terminal commands or database manipulation scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact file specified in the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker should clearly show the selection of '/home/ga/Documents/visitor_photo_marcus_webb.jpg', and the agent should not be seen downloading a different image from a web browser.

integrity.description: The interaction occurred within the actual Jolly Lobby Track application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface should match Jolly Lobby Track, not a text editor, mock-up, or generic database viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target visitor record is for 'Marcus Webb'. The photo to be attached is located at '/home/ga/Documents/visitor_photo_marcus_webb.jpg'. Note that due to a broken source URL, the environment generates a random noise image at this path instead of a real portrait photo. The VLM should expect the attached photo to look like static/noise.
